title: viola arvensis var. segetalis
intro: Viola arvensis var. segetalis, also known as wild pansy or field pansy, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant's health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, such as diarrhea and nausea, as well as its possible anti-anxiety and anti-depressant properties. Wild pansy can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in homeopathy and folk medicine.
